title: Copper Golem Cosmetics
description: Lets you place any Items in the Copper Golems Head just like the Iron Golem placing poppy!!!
body:
#   🧡 **Copper Golem Cosmetics** 
  
  **Right-Click Head Accessories!**

Bring your Copper Golems to life with personality, style, and charm!
This datapack lets players **place ANY item** onto a Copper Golem’s antenna (head rod) simply by **right-clicking**.

Perfect for survival worlds, roleplay servers, SMPs, or anyone who wants their golems to look adorable or completely unhinged.

---

## ✨ **Features**

✔ **Place Any Item on the Golem’s Head**

Right-click the Copper Golem’s rod with an item → it sits naturally on its head like the poppy moment from the official reveal.

✔ **Take the Item Back Smoothly**

Right-click again with an **empty hand** → you get the stored item instantly.

✔ **Smart Item Swapping System**

If the golem already has an item **AND** you right-click while holding something,
➡ The item on the golem and the item in your hand **swap perfectly**.

✔ **Inventory-Safe Return**

If your inventory is full, the item drops safely to the ground so nothing is lost.

✔ **Lightweight & Fully Survival-Friendly**

No commands required. No custom items. No resource pack needed.
100% multiplayer compatible.

---

### 🔧 **Supported Versions**

* **Minecraft 1.21.9**
* **Minecraft 1.21.10**
* **Minecraft 1.21.11**

Three separate downloads — use the one matching your server/client.

---

### 📦 **Installation**

1. Download the correct version ZIP.
2. Place it inside your world folder:
   `world/datapacks/`
3. Start the world (or run `/reload`).
4. Enjoy styling your Copper Golems!


**You are more than welcome to include my mod/datpacks/resourpacks in you _MODPACKS_**

---

### **🧑‍🎨 **Created By:** *Mcaura***

A simple datapack with a big personality.
